#  Rename Drawing Disciplines 
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * 'Admin' on the project's Drawings tool.


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to your project's**Drawings tool**.
  2. Click**Gear**![Icon Settings Gear Grey](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/d651ae1e759a4006d989865fe93a0703/c5de24f60e608c6628a50f5ac5356031/icon-settings-gear-grey.png?fm=webp&h=18)**icon.**
  3. Scroll down to **Edit Drawing Disciplines.**
  4. Edit the name in the field.
  5. Click out of the field to save.


## See Also
  * [Configure Advanced Settings: Drawings](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-project/tutorials/configure-advanced-settings-drawings)
  * [Configure Default Drawing Disciplines](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-project/tutorials/configure-default-drawing-disciplines)
  * [Move Drawing Disciplines](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-project/tutorials/move-drawing-disciplines)
title: Rename Drawing Disciplines
description: How to rename drawing disciplines in your project's Drawings log.
